repo_prior_art.cite: none; the closest catalogue item is q1_sign_flip, a linear FWL sign-flip result rather than PPML.

published_prior_art.cite: MoreauKastler2025PTT, equations (3.4)-(3.6) and Appendix B1 already give the exact 2x3 PPML likelihood system and its heterogeneous-effect sign-reversal mechanism.

repo_prior_art.cite: q1_sign_flip is a distinct linear-projection sign-threshold problem and does not characterize an endogenous PPML pseudo-true score root.

published_prior_art.cite: MoreauKastler2025PTT establishes the 2x3 PPML pathology, while no verified source supplies the proposed finite timing-and-baseline necessary-and-sufficient global frontier.

soundness_flags.label: Open-ended Question 1 / def:global-sign-frontier-handle
soundness_flags.one_line: The requested primitive condition is to use only “timing-cell counts and baseline masses,” but neither quantity is formally defined, so the proposed frontier predicate and its claimed inputs are not yet mathematically pinned down.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: Open-ended Question 1
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: The result is conditional on an interior normalized population-KL minimizer and positive-definite normalized information, and makes no sampling-inference claim.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: A population sign-frontier characterization for beta_N^* under ass:finite-projection-existence and ass:finite-information-rank.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Define explicit primitives such as cohort counts n_g and baseline masses B_gt (or the exact unit-level masses if those are required), then restate the OEQ as a quantified iff over those objects.

Derive and state the exact two-by-three negative-coefficient threshold implied by MoreauKastler2025PTT equation (3.6), then make the new kernel explicitly begin at T>=4 or a multi-cohort class not resolved by that formula.
Turn the screening frontier into a diagnose-then-correct result by giving a computable heterogeneous-PPML alternative targeting PTT_N on the unsafe region.

recommended_next_step: Revise the OEQ to define its proposed primitive inputs and delimit the already-solved 2x3 Moreau-Kastler case; then advance the repaired field-tier kernel to Stage 0.
